name: Aberrant Lich Bonus

rulesText.description: Adds +2 CHA and supports lich-style undead/Far Realm traits such as Soul Vessel, Far Realm Mutation, Unnatural Armor, Arcane Mastery, and Telepathy.

desc: Adds +2 CHA and supports lich-style undead/Far Realm traits such as Soul Vessel, Far Realm Mutation, Unnatural Armor, Arcane Mastery, and Telepathy.
